choices.text: PDA token account: token::mint = mint, token::authority = vault_authority where vault_authority is a PDA derived by your program. PDA signs withdrawals via new_with_signer + seeds. No private key needed.

questions.explanation: PDA as vault authority; program signs via seeds.

choices.text: Delegate pattern: user calls token::approve granting DEX PDA spending authority up to max amount. DEX swaps without taking custody. User revokes anytime. Standard for Jupiter, Orca, Phoenix.
